title: RapidMeta Oncology | KRAS G12C Inhibitors in Pretreated KRAS-G12C-Mutated Advanced NSCLC NMA v1.0
hero_h2: KRAS G12C Inhibitors in Pretreated KRAS-G12C+ Advanced NSCLC

pico.pop: Adults with KRAS-G12C-mutated locally advanced unresectable or metastatic NSCLC after >=1 prior line of platinum-based chemotherapy and PD-(L)1 inhibitor
pico.int: Sotorasib 960 mg PO QD or Adagrasib 600 mg PO BID (oral KRAS-G12C inhibitors)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary in both pivotal trials); overall survival (key secondary)
pico.subgroup: Prior PD-(L)1 line, brain metastases, ECOG PS, CNS metastases status

real_data_entries.name: CodeBreaK 200
real_data_entries.group: KRAS-G12C+ pretreated NSCLC, sotorasib 960 mg PO QD vs docetaxel (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Confirmed objective response rate (RR vs docetaxel)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Johnson ML et al. Lancet Oncol 2023;24:1093-1106 (CodeBreaK 200).

real_data_entries.name: KRYSTAL-12
real_data_entries.group: KRAS-G12C+ pretreated NSCLC, adagrasib 600 mg PO BID vs docetaxel (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Confirmed objective response rate (RR vs docetaxel)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Tan DSW et al. (KRYSTAL-12) — ESMO 2024 plenary; manuscript in publication.
